description: Unified hooks for coder-workflow + codegraph-mapper: orchestrator reminder, auto-scan graph, bug tracking, task verification, and graph refresh.

hooks.command: echo 'SessionStart reminder: run /coder-workflow:coder-workflow (or /coder-workflow:plan) to initialize orchestrator routing.' && test -f .codegraph/graph.db || (codegraph-mapper scan 2>/dev/null || npx codegraph-mapper scan 2>/dev/null || coder-workflow scan 2>/dev/null || true)
echo 'Bug tracking reminder: ensure all discovered bugs are tracked as TaskCreate entries and fixed in the Bug Fix Phase.'
test -f .codegraph/graph.db && (codegraph-mapper update 2>/dev/null || coder-workflow update 2>/dev/null || true) || (codegraph-mapper scan 2>/dev/null || coder-workflow scan 2>/dev/null || true)
